title: Models
summary: LLMs such as GPT, Claude, Gemini, Llama, and Qwen handle language reasoning and tool selection.
body:
LLMs such as GPT, Claude, Gemini, Llama, and Qwen handle language reasoning and tool selection.

XGBoost and LightGBM handle structured financial prediction.
GARCH handles volatility forecasting.
Monte Carlo handles scenario and risk simulation.
VaR and CVaR estimate portfolio risk.
Isolation Forest and autoencoders detect anomalies.
Embedding models support semantic retrieval.

Agent = decides what to do.
Model = produces a prediction or representation.
Tool = performs an action.
